body_txt: The Jaded Washout, the guy ( sometimes girl) who never did anything with their life. Sure, they might have had promise back in high school when they were the Big Man on Campus or the ruling Alpha Bitch , but in any event they clearly never planned for what would happen after graduation. Now that the best years of their lives are long gone, they're adult-aged nobodys running on what little social inertia they can still muster. They often lament their lost potential for greatness. They're jaded, cynical, world-weary, bitter, disrespected by friends and family, underpaid and underappreciated in a degrading dead-end job and struggling to achieve basic goals and recognition. May often be heard complaining about not getting justly rewarded for their effort, although closer inspection may very well show them to be a profoundly uninspired if not outright lazy worker and angrily resentful of those who have matured beyond them. Compare with Unsympathetic Comedy Protagonist , This Loser Is You , I Coulda Been a Contender! , Future Loser , Hates the Job, Loves the Limelight , Loser Protagonist , White-Dwarf Starlet , and Former Child Star . Contrast Best Years of Your Life , Jaded Professional , Elite Athlete's Aging Angst and Small Name, Big Ego .
